article.title: Sandisk brings back affordable storage to rescue buyers from the SSD crisis — new 320 and 520 SATA SSDs are ready to launch
article.summary: Sandisk prepares to launch 520 and 320 SATA SSDs with capacities up to 4TB.
article.title_zh: Sandisk brings back affordable storage to rescue buyers from the SSD crisis — new 320 and 520 SATA SSDs are ready to launch
article.summary_zh: Sandisk prepares to launch 520 and 320 SATA SSDs with capacities up to 4TB.

article.title: SoftBank launches sovereign AI GPU cloud
article.summary: The Nvidia-powered service bundles SoftBank’s telecom edge network with central GPU data centers In sum – what we know: SoftBank has announced its “AI Data Center GPU Cloud,” a sovereign AI infrastructure service that pushes the operator further away from…
article.title_zh: SoftBank 推出主權 AI GPU 雲端服務
article.summary_zh: 這項由 Nvidia 驅動的服務將 SoftBank 的電信邊緣網路與中央 GPU 資料中心整合在一起。

article.title: LLMs believe false statements even after explicit warnings that they're false
article.summary: Imagine a kid who grows up reading history books where every page is stamped "WARNING: THIS BOOK IS LYING." You'd expect them to come away skeptical, or at least uncertain. New research on so-called "negation neglect" finds that LLMs in a roughly analogous situation don't behave that way. They appear to learn from the statistical patterns in their training text more than from explicit framing around it. Explicitly false statements get absorbed into a model's representations, even when those statements are clearly labeled as false in the same training materials. In a recent preprint paper , an international team of university and corporate-sponsored researchers said the finding could help explain why LLMs frequently hallucinate false information and has implications for how quality AI train
article.title_zh: LLM 即使在明確警告後仍然相信虛假陳述
article.summary_zh: 新研究發現，所謂的「否定忽視」現象表明，大語言模型在面對虛假信息明確警告時，表現不如預期那樣持懷疑態度。

article.title: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
article.title_zh: ITBench-AA：前沿模型在首個代理企業 IT 任務基準測試中得分低於 50%——由 Artificial Analysis 和 IBM 發佈

article.title: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
article.summary: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscription brand.
article.title_zh: Meta 推出 Instagram、Facebook 和 WhatsApp 訂閱服務，未來還將推出包括 AI 計畫在內的更多服務
article.summary_zh: Meta 在全球推出 Instagram、Facebook 和 WhatsApp 的付費訂閱計畫，同時測試新的 AI、創作者和商業相關服務，這些服務均納入其更廣泛的「Meta One」訂閱品牌。

article.title: Meta 三大社群平台推出 Plus 訂閱方案，服務創作者、重度用戶
article.summary: Meta 今年稍早宣布對 Facebook、Instagram、WhatsApp 進行訂閱方案測試後，接下來數 […]

article.title: Claude Opus 4.8 launches today with agentic improvements, new features
article.summary: Anthropic has today announced Claude Opus 4.8, the latest version of its AI model, with a focus on improving agentic capabilities. more…
article.title_zh: Claude Opus 4.8 今日推出，具有代理改進和新功能
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 今日宣布推出 Claude Opus 4.8，其最新 AI 模型版本專注於改進代理能力。

article.title: Vertu wants CEOs to run companies from an AI foldable starting at $6,880
article.summary: Built on top of the open source Hermes project, Vertu's new foldable combines AI-agent workflows, enterprise integrations, and ultra-premium luxury finishes.
article.title_zh: Vertu 希望執行長透過起價 $6,880 的 AI 折疊機運營公司
article.summary_zh: 基於開源 Hermes 專案構建的 Vertu 新型折疊機結合了 AI 智能體工作流、企業整合和超高端奢華設計。

article.title: Anthropic Unveils New Flagship AI Model That’s Better at Coding
article.summary: Anthropic PBC is rolling out an updated version of its most powerful artificial intelligence model barely a month after the prior release, a bid to keep ahead of rivals like OpenAI and Alphabet Inc.’s Google.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 推出新旗艦 AI 模型，編程能力更強
article.summary_zh: Anthropic PBC 在上一版本發布僅一個月後就推出了其最強大人工智能模型的更新版本，以保持領先 OpenAI 和 Google 等競爭對手。

article.title: Meta Copies Snapchat’s Homework Again With ‘Plus’ Features for Instagram and Facebook
article.summary: Meta’s upcoming Instagram Plus and Facebook Plus subscriptions are the latest example of the company seeing what works elsewhere and mimicking it.
article.title_zh: Meta 再次模仿 Snapchat，為 Instagram 和 Facebook 推出「Plus」功能
article.summary_zh: Meta 即將推出的 Instagram Plus 和 Facebook Plus 訂閱服務，是該公司看到其他地方的成功並複製的最新案例。

article.title: AI costs begin to bite as agents may increase token demand by 24 times, says Goldman Sachs report — Uber and Microsoft among companies feeling the bite of tokenized billing
article.summary: Major tech companies are considering refining their approaches to AI, as rising token costs and increased token demand from AI agents make the costs harder to justify, with limited return on the investment.
article.title_zh: 隨著代理可能增加24倍的token需求，AI成本開始咬人，Goldman Sachs報告稱——Uber和Microsoft等公司感受到tokenized計費的衝擊
article.summary_zh: 隨著AI代理的token成本上升和需求增加，主要科技公司正在考慮改進AI方案，因為投資報酬率有限且成本難以證明。

article.title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
article.summary: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.
article.title_zh: Amazon 傳來更多好消息，Snowflake 與 AWS 簽署 60 億美元 AI CPU 晶片協議
article.summary_zh: Snowflake 與 Amazon 簽署了一份新的、價值巨大的五年協議，以獲取用於 AI 的晶片；Nvidia 再次受到警告。

article.title: Anthropic upgrades Claude with new Opus 4.8 model, details here
article.summary: Anthropic has released its latest AI model with Claude Opus 4.8. The new version arrives less than two months after the previous model upgrade, ramping up Anthropic’s upgrade cadence. more…
article.title_zh: Anthropic 推出新的 Claude Opus 4.8 模型，詳情在此
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 發布了最新的 AI 模型 Claude Opus 4.8，距離上一次模型升級不到兩個月，加快了升級步伐。
